title: melampyrum nemorosum subsp. debreceniense
intro: Melampyrum nemorosum subsp. debreceniense is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Melampyrum nemorosum plant, a type of yellow-spotted cow-wheat that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family of flowering plants. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Melampyrum nemorosum subsp. debreceniense are still being researched, but it has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more studies are needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
